query: What percentage do I pay for major dental work like a crown?
answer:
You pay for major dental work like a crown after satisfying any applicable deductible.

| Benefit | Service | In-Network | Out-of-Network | Limitations |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Class III - Major Services | Inlays, onlays, crowns and labial veneers for a tooth that is decayed, or fractured or where there is significant loss of clinical crown and no other dentally appropriate restoration will restore the tooth | 20% coinsurance after calendar year deductible | Benefits based on allowed amount | are limited to once every 5 calendar years from the original seat date. |
| Class III - Major Services | Crown build-ups or post and cores for covered crowns | 20% coinsurance after calendar year deductible | Benefits based on allowed amount | No additional limitations. |

| Topic | Coverage Information |
| :--- | :--- |
| Benefit Percentages (Coinsurance) | After you satisfy the required calendar year deductible if one applies, you pay the following coinsurance per calendar year, up to the dental benefit maximum. Dental services fall into 3 categories: Class I - Diagnostic and Preventive services, Class II - Basic services, and Class III - Major services. In this section you’ll find a description of the services included in each category. • Class I - Diagnostic and Preventive Services .... 0% • Class II - Basic Services .................................. 20% • Class III - Major Services ................................. 20% |
